decisions.decision: feat/fix-after-matmod is the canonical fresh A+B branch.
decisions.rationale: It now contains Variant B plus the local main Variant A/cleanup line.

decisions.decision: Remove the separate feature worktree after the branch refresh.
decisions.rationale: The worktree name was stale and made it unclear where the newest code lived.

decisions.decision: Variant B remains a deterministic_tools fallback, not a separate graph node.
decisions.rationale: It keeps the pipeline transparent and avoids routing churn.
Runtime LLM failures must surface as explicit gated/error artifacts.

verification: Before refresh: combined targeted run -> 99 passed, 1 warning
known_out_of_scope: Full tests/test_schema_validators.py contains an old live_llm_required=False narrator contract conflict.
Generated batch/workflow outputs from the removed feature worktree are not part of the canonical code state.
